general.description: View cookies which had been found in the shop

list.textDeleteConfirm: Do you want to delete cookie

detail.fieldTitleTooltipCardId: The cookie ID is used to clearly identify the cookie.
detail.notificationSaveErrorMessage: An error occurred on saving the cookie.
detail.fieldDefaultValueHelpText: If a default value is chosen, the cookie will always be set as soon as it is accepted. This is useful when custom cookies are defined, which should then be handled in the storefront via JavaScript.
detail.fieldScriptHelpText: The script code is executed when the cookie is accepted by the user. The script can be specified with the <script> tag or without. An external script (src attribute) can also be included. In addition, TWIG code can be entered and TWIG variables can be used.
detail.fieldGoogleCookieConsentModePlaceholder: Select a Google Cookie Consent Mode Option
detail.googleCookieConsentModeOption1: ad_storage - Enables storage (such as cookies) related to advertising.
detail.googleCookieConsentModeOption2: ad_user_data - Sets consent for sending user data related to advertising to Google.
detail.googleCookieConsentModeOption3: ad_personalization - Sets consent for personalized advertising.
detail.googleCookieConsentModeOption4: analytics_storage - Enables storage (such as cookies) related to analytics e.g. visit duration.
detail.googleCookieConsentModeOption5: functionality_storage - Enables storage that supports the functionality of the website or app e.g. language settings.
detail.googleCookieConsentModeOption6: personalization_storage - Enables storage related to personalization e.g. video recommendations
detail.googleCookieConsentModeOption7: security_storage - Enables storage related to security such as authentication functionality, fraud prevention, and other user protection.
